listing.title: Hand-bound notebook set, edition of seven
listing.description: Linen-thread binding on acid-free paper. Shipped from Kyoto when the auction closes.

listing.title: Restored 1962 tabletop radio
listing.description: Chassis recapped, speaker reconditioned. In working order before it ships.

listing.title: Field recording album, three coastal seasons
listing.description: Three seasons of coastal field recordings, pressed to quiet vinyl.

listing.title: Community letterpress revival
listing.description: A used Heidelberg platen press, set up as a studio the neighborhood can book.

listing.title: Letterpress calling cards, edition of fifty
listing.description: Hand-set metal type, printed on cotton stock. Fifty cards to an edition.

listing.title: Wheel-thrown mug, stoneware
listing.description: Thrown and glazed in small batches. Each one a little different.

listing.title: Pottery workshop, live from the kiln room
listing.description: A working session from the kiln room. No edit, no replay scheduled.

listing.title: Coastal tapes, six tracks
listing.description: Six tracks recorded on the shore across one winter.

listing.title: Bells and water, single
listing.description: One take, one morning, by the river.

listing.title: Morning Draft — Letter 11
listing.description: The eleventh weekly letter. On revising in the open.

note: Issue 12 of a weekly letter; continues the chain from Letter 11.

listing.title: Morning Draft — Letter 12
listing.description: The twelfth letter. What a week of reader notes changed.

listing.title: Knife sharpening by post
listing.description: Send a blade; it comes back sharp. Turnaround about a week.

listing.title: Looking for a letterpress operator, two days a month
listing.description: A small studio looking for someone who knows platen presses. Quiet work, regular hours.

listing.title: Offering darkroom time, central Kyoto
listing.description: A shared darkroom with two enlargers, open to careful hands on weekday evenings.
